surveys.title: Perceived Stress (PSQ-inspired)
surveys.description: A short stress reflection to understand perceived pressure this week.

questions.base_text: In the last week, how often did you feel nervous or stressed?
natural_variants: This week — have you found yourself feeling nervous or stressed?
Would you say you often felt stressed over the past seven days?
Has stress been a regular part of your week recently?

questions.base_text: How often did you feel you were unable to control important things in your life?
natural_variants: Did you feel out of control about important things recently?
How much did you feel unable to manage key parts of your life this week?

questions.base_text: How often did you feel difficulties were piling up so high that you could not overcome them?
natural_variants: Have things felt like they were piling up beyond what you can handle?
Did you feel overwhelmed by tasks or problems this week?

surveys.follow_up: Consider a brief breathing exercise and a two-minute break when pressure builds.

surveys.title: PHQ-9 (Depression screening)

questions.base_text: Over the last 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by feeling down, depressed, or hopeless?
natural_variants: In the past fortnight, have you felt down or hopeless?

surveys.follow_up: If moderate or higher scores appear, consider discussing with a clinician.

surveys.title: GAD-7 (Anxiety)

questions.base_text: Over the last 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by feeling nervous, anxious or on edge?
natural_variants: Have you been feeling anxious or on edge recently?

surveys.follow_up: If anxiety is frequent, try a short grounding exercise and monitor symptom patterns.
